menu_items.name: Teletina pod pekom
menu_items.description: Sočna teletina polako pečena 3 sata ispod peke prekrivene žarom, s mladim krumpirima i lukom.

menu_items.name: Krčka janjetina pod pekom
menu_items.description: Janjetina s krčkih pašnjaka pečena pod pekom s domaćim krumpirom i svježom kaduljom.

menu_items.name: Hobotnica pod pekom
menu_items.description: Cijela jadranska hobotnica sporo pečena pod pekom s krumpirima, maslinama i bijelim vinom.

menu_items.name: Domaći pivac pod pekom
menu_items.description: Domaći pijetao pečen pod pekom s krumpirom, mladom mrkvom i ružmarinom.

menu_items.name: Veprina pod pekom
menu_items.description: Meso divljeg vepra marinirano u vinu i lovorovom listu, pečeno pod pekom sa suhim šljivama.

menu_items.name: Odojak pod pekom
menu_items.description: Svinjski odojak pečen pod pekom dok kožica ne postane rumena i hrskava, s krumpirima.

menu_items.name: Miješana peka
menu_items.description: Bogata kombinacija telećeg karea i janjećeg buta sporo pečenih pod pekom s povrćem.

menu_items.name: Janjeća koljenica pod pekom
menu_items.description: Janjeća koljenica sporo kuhana i pečena pod pekom s korjenastim povrćem i prošekom.

menu_items.name: Patka pod pekom s jabukama
menu_items.description: Domaća patka sporo pečena pod pekom s kiselkastim jabukama, krumpirima i cimetom.

menu_items.name: Povrće pod pekom
menu_items.description: Krumpir, mrkva, tikvice, luk, patlidžani i paprika pečeni pod pekom s maslinovim uljem.

menu_items.name: Pizza Margherita
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, svježa mozzarella, maslinovo ulje i svježi bosiljak.

menu_items.name: Pizza Vesuvio
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, mozzarella, kuhana šunka i origano.

menu_items.name: Pizza Capricciosa
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, mozzarella, kuhana šunka, svježi šampinjoni i masline.

menu_items.name: Pizza Quattro Formaggi
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, mozzarella, gorgonzola, lokalni krčki sir i parmezan.

menu_items.name: Pizza Al Tonno
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, mozzarella, tunjevina, kapari, crveni luk i maslinovo ulje.

menu_items.name: Pizza Picante
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, mozzarella, ljuta salama, feferoni, ajvar i crveni luk.

menu_items.name: Krčka pizza
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, lokalni krčki ovčji sir, domaći pršut, divlje smokve i rikula.

menu_items.name: Pizza Rustica
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, mozzarella, domaći špek, šampinjoni, kiselo vrhnje i luk.

menu_items.name: Pizza Vegetariana
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, mozzarella, grillane tikvice, patlidžani, paprika, kukuruz i cherry rajčice.

menu_items.name: Bistro Top Special
menu_items.description: Umak od rajčice, mozzarella, trakice junećeg bifteka, krema od tartufa i svježa rikula.

menu_items.name: Krčki pršut i ovčji sir
menu_items.description: Domaći pršut sušen na buri, ovčji sir iz lokalne sirane, masline i smokve.

menu_items.name: Salata od hobotnice
menu_items.description: Kuhani komadi hobotnice s krumpirom, crvenim lukom, peršinom i domaćim uljem.

menu_items.name: Slane srdele s lukom
menu_items.description: Fileti slanih srdela u maslinovom ulju s crvenim lukom na toasted kruhu.

menu_items.name: Krčki presnac
menu_items.description: Tradicionalni kolač od mladog ovčjeg sira, jaja i limunove korice u slatkom tijestu.

menu_items.name: Domaća rožata
menu_items.description: Kremasti karamel custard puding s aromom ružinog likera.

menu_items.name: Domaća štrudla od jabuka
menu_items.description: Topla savijača s kiselim jabukama, cimetom i grožđicama uz umak od vanilije.

menu_items.name: Čokoladni lava kolač
menu_items.description: Topli kolač s tekućim čokoladnim srcem, poslužen s kuglicom sladoleda.

menu_items.name: Palačinke s orasima i medom
menu_items.description: Tople palačinke punjene mljevenim orasima i prelivene domaćim krčkim medom.

menu_items.name: Fritule s cimetom i šećerom
menu_items.description: Domaće pržene fritule posute šećerom u prahu i cimetom.

menu_items.name: Smokve u prošeku
menu_items.description: Krčke smokve kuhane u slatkom prošeku, poslužene tople uz sladoled od vanilije.

menu_items.name: Orada s gradela
menu_items.description: Svježa cijela orada pečena na roštilju s ružmarinom. Prilog: kuhana blitva i krumpir s češnjakom.

menu_items.name: Brancin s gradela
menu_items.description: Cijeli brancin s roštilja premazan maslinovim uljem i češnjakom, poslužen s blitvom.

menu_items.name: Jadranske lignje na žaru
menu_items.description: Cijele jadranske lignje na gradelama, prelivene umakom od peršina, češnjaka i krčkog maslinovog ulja.

menu_items.name: Pržene lignje s pomfritom
menu_items.description: Hrskavi kolutići prženih lignji posluženi uz pomfrit i krišku limuna s tartar umakom.

menu_items.name: Crni rižot od sipa
menu_items.description: Kremasti rižot od jadranske sipe s njezinim crnilom, maslinovim uljem i parmezanom.

menu_items.name: Dagnje na crvenu buzaru
menu_items.description: Svježe dagnje kuhane na buzaru s rajčicom, češnjakom, peršinom i bijelim vinom Žlahtina.

menu_items.name: Tuna odrezak na žaru
menu_items.description: Debeli odrezak tune s roštilja premazan maslinovim uljem, poslužen na posteljici od rikule.

menu_items.name: Kvarnerski škampi na buzaru
menu_items.description: Prvoklasni škampi iz Kvarnerskog zaljeva kuhani na bijelu buzaru s maslinovim uljem i češnjakom.

menu_items.name: Rižot od kozica i tikvica
menu_items.description: Kremasti rižot s jadranskim kozicama, mladim tikvicama i maslinovim uljem.

menu_items.name: Grdobina u bijelom umaku
menu_items.description: Filet grdobine kuhan u bijelom umaku od češnjaka, vina i vrhnja s kuhanim krumpirom.

menu_items.name: Domaći ćevapčići
menu_items.description: 10 ćevapčića od 100% junetine pečenih na drvenom ugljenu, posluženih u vrućem somunu s lukom i ajvarom.

menu_items.name: Pljeskavica s kajmakom
menu_items.description: Velika juneća pljeskavica poslužena u somunu s izdašnim komadom domaćeg kajmaka i crvenim lukom.

menu_items.name: Punjena pljeskavica
menu_items.description: Juneća pljeskavica punjena domaćim sirom i kockicama špeka, pečena na roštilju.

menu_items.name: Miješano meso 'Bistro Top'
menu_items.description: Ugljeni žar klasik: ćevapčići, svinjski ražnjić, marinirani pileći file i domaća kobasica s pomfritom.

menu_items.name: Ražnjići od svinjskog karea
menu_items.description: Svinjski file nanizan na ražnjiće s lukom i paprikom, grillan i poslužen uz pekarski krumpir.

menu_items.name: Teleći kotleti s biljem
menu_items.description: Debeli teleći kotleti pečeni na žaru, preliveni emulzijom maslinovog ulja, ružmarina i češnjaka.

menu_items.name: Ramstek na gradelama
menu_items.description: Odležani juneći ramstek s roštilja s pečenim krumpirom i maslinama.

menu_items.name: Marinirani pileći file
menu_items.description: Pileći file mariniran u lokalnom začinskom bilju i limunu, pečen na žaru i poslužen s tikvicama.

menu_items.name: Domaće krčke kobasice
menu_items.description: Tradicionalne svinjske kobasice rađene na otoku Krku, pečene na roštilju i poslužene s kiselim kupusom.

menu_items.name: Biftek u papru
menu_items.description: Vrhunski juneći biftek s roštilja premazan maslacem i preliven umakom od zelenog papra i konjaka.

hero.subtitle: Uživajte u odličnim pizzama, sočnom roštilju i bogatim porcijama na otoku Krku.
hero.desc: Svakodnevno za vas pripremamo vrhunske burgere, tople domaće pizze iz krušne peći i jela s otvorenog roštilja na drveni ugljen. Dođite u opuštenu atmosferu i ugasite glad uz izdašne i ukusne obroke.

about.title: Dobrodošli u Bistro Top
about.desc: Smješten u samom srcu otoka Krka, **Bistro Top** nudi vrhunska, svježe pripremljena jela. Naša jednostavna filozofija donosi obilne i ukusne porcije u kojima uživa cijela obitelj.
about.feature1_desc: Sočni burgeri i klasični ćevapčići pečeni na pravom žaru.
about.feature2_desc: Bogate, hrskave pizze iz krušne peći s puno rastopljenog sira.
about.bottom_text: Bilo da dolazite na brzi ručak nakon plaže, večeru s prijateljima ili obiteljsko druženje, naš jelovnik nudi bogat izbor pizza, mesnih jela s roštilja, burgera i svježih salata. Ovdje nitko ne ostaje gladan!

menu.title: Naš jelovnik
menu.subtitle: Istražite bogatu ponudu autohtonih otočkih i jadranskih specijaliteta, pripremljenih s ljubavlju.
menu.banner_subtitle: Domaći ugođaj i tradicionalna krčka kuhinja
menu.allergy_note: * Molimo da o mogućim alergijama obavijestite naše osoblje prije naručivanja. Sve cijene su izražene u eurima i uključuju PDV.

footer.copyright: Bistro Top Krk. Sva prava pridržana.

action_box.reserve_subtitle: Osigurajte svoje mjesto na vrijeme. Unesite svoje podatke ispod kako biste pokrenuli brzu rezervaciju stola putem WhatsApp poruke.
action_box.order_subtitle: Ako želite naručiti dostavu hrane na kućnu adresu ili radije preferirate brzu telefonsku rezervaciju stola uživo, kontaktirajte nas direktno.
action_box.whatsapp_template: Pozdrav! Želio bih rezervirati stol u Bistrou Top. Ime i prezime: {name}, Broj ljudi: {guests}, Datum: {date}, Vrijeme: {time}

hero.subtitle: Enjoy excellent pizzas, juicy grills and hearty portions on Krk island.
hero.desc: Every day we prepare premium burgers, hot homemade pizzas from the wood-fired oven and dishes from the open charcoal grill. Come to a relaxed atmosphere and satisfy your hunger with generous and delicious meals.

about.title: Welcome to Bistro Top
about.desc: Located in the heart of Krk island, **Bistro Top** offers simple, freshly prepared dishes. Our philosophy is to serve generous, delicious portions that the whole family can enjoy.
about.feature1_desc: Juicy burgers and classic specialties grilled over real charcoal.
about.feature2_desc: Crispy wood-fired pizzas loaded with homemade sauce and melted cheese.
about.bottom_text: Whether you come for a quick lunch after the beach, dinner with friends or a family gathering, our menu offers a rich selection of pizzas, grilled meats, burgers and fresh salads. Nobody goes home hungry!

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Explore the rich offer of authentic island and Adriatic specialties, prepared with love.
menu.banner_subtitle: Cozy ambient and traditional Krk cuisine
menu.allergy_note: * Please inform our staff of any possible allergies before ordering. All prices are in EUR and include VAT.

piz-1.name: Pizza Margherita
piz-1.description: Tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, olive oil and fresh basil.

piz-2.name: Pizza Vesuvio
piz-2.description: Tomato sauce, mozzarella, ham and oregano.

piz-3.name: Pizza Capricciosa
piz-3.description: Tomato sauce, mozzarella, ham, fresh mushrooms and olives.

piz-4.name: Pizza Quattro Formaggi
piz-4.description: Tomato sauce, mozzarella, gorgonzola, local Krk cheese and parmesan.

piz-5.name: Pizza Al Tonno
piz-5.description: Tomato sauce, mozzarella, tuna, capers, red onion and olive oil.

piz-6.name: Pizza Picante
piz-6.description: Tomato sauce, mozzarella, spicy salami, hot peppers, ajvar and red onion.

piz-7.name: Krk Pizza
piz-7.description: Tomato sauce, local Krk sheep cheese, prosciutto, wild figs and arugula.

piz-8.name: Pizza Rustica
piz-8.description: Tomato sauce, mozzarella, bacon, mushrooms, sour cream and onions.

piz-9.name: Pizza Vegetariana
piz-9.description: Tomato sauce, mozzarella, grilled zucchini, eggplant, peppers, corn and cherry tomatoes.

piz-10.name: Bistro Top Special
piz-10.description: Tomato sauce, mozzarella, beef tenderloin strips, truffle cream and fresh arugula.

ros-1.name: Homemade Ćevapčići
ros-1.description: 10 pieces of 100% beef grilled on charcoal, served in hot somun flatbread with onions and ajvar.

ros-2.name: Pljeskavica with Kajmak
ros-2.description: Large beef patty served in somun flatbread with a generous dollop of homemade kajmak cream and onions.

ros-3.name: Stuffed Pljeskavica
ros-3.description: Beef patty stuffed with local cheese and bacon bits, grilled over charcoal.

ros-4.name: Mixed Meat 'Bistro Top'
ros-4.description: Charcoal classics: ćevapčići, pork skewer, marinated chicken fillet and local sausage served with french fries.

ros-5.name: Pork Loin Skewers
ros-5.description: Pork loin threaded onto skewers with onions and peppers, grilled and served with baked potatoes.

ros-6.name: Veal Chops with Herbs
ros-6.description: Thick grilled veal chops drizzled with olive oil, fresh rosemary and garlic emulsion.

ros-7.name: Grilled Rump Steak
ros-7.description: Aged beef rump steak grilled on charcoal, served with baked potatoes and olives.

ros-8.name: Marinated Chicken Fillet
ros-8.description: Chicken fillet marinated in local herbs and lemon, grilled on charcoal, served with zucchini.

ros-9.name: Homemade Krk Sausages
ros-9.description: Traditional pork sausages made on Krk island, grilled and served with sauerkraut.

ros-10.name: Pepper Steak
ros-10.description: Premium beef tenderloin grilled, brushed with butter and topped with green peppercorn and cognac sauce.

pek-1.name: Veal under Peka
pek-1.description: Tender veal slow-roasted for 3 hours under a iron bell covered with embers, served with baby potatoes and onions.

pek-2.name: Krk Lamb under Peka
pek-2.description: Local pasture-raised lamb roasted under peka with domestic potatoes and fresh sage leaves.

pek-3.name: Octopus under Peka
pek-3.description: Whole Adriatic octopus slow-baked under peka with potatoes, black olives and white wine.

pek-4.name: Domestic Rooster under Peka
pek-4.description: Free-range rooster baked under the iron bell with potatoes, baby carrots and fresh rosemary.

pek-5.name: Wild Boar under Peka
pek-5.description: Wild boar meat marinated in red wine and bay leaves, slow-baked under peka with dried plums.

pek-6.name: Suckling Pig under Peka
pek-6.description: Suckling pork pig slow-roasted under peka until skin is golden and crispy, served with potatoes.

pek-7.name: Mixed Peka Platter
pek-7.description: Hearty combination of veal loin and lamb leg slow-roasted under the iron bell with seasonal vegetables.

pek-8.name: Lamb Shank under Peka
pek-8.description: Lamb shank slow-cooked and roasted under peka with root vegetables and sweet prošek wine.

pek-9.name: Duck under Peka with Apples
pek-9.description: Domestic duck slow-roasted under peka with tart apples, potatoes and a touch of cinnamon.

pek-10.name: Vegetables under Peka
pek-10.description: Potatoes, carrots, zucchini, onions, eggplants and peppers baked under the iron bell with olive oil.

rib-1.name: Grilled Sea Bream
rib-1.description: Fresh whole sea bream grilled with rosemary. Served with boiled Swiss chard and garlic potatoes.

rib-2.name: Grilled Sea Bass
rib-2.description: Whole sea bass grilled on charcoal, brushed with olive oil and garlic, served with chard.

rib-3.name: Grilled Adriatic Squid
rib-3.description: Whole Adriatic squid grilled, drizzled with parsley, garlic and local Krk olive oil.

rib-4.name: Fried Squid with Fries
rib-4.description: Crispy fried squid rings served with golden french fries, lemon wedge and tartar sauce.

rib-5.name: Black Cuttlefish Risotto
rib-5.description: Creamy risotto made with local cuttlefish, its ink, olive oil and grated parmesan.

rib-6.name: Mussels in Tomato Buzara
rib-6.description: Fresh local mussels cooked in tomato, garlic, parsley and Žlahtina local white wine sauce.

rib-7.name: Grilled Tuna Steak
rib-7.description: Thick fresh tuna steak grilled on charcoal, brushed with olive oil, served on arugula bed.

rib-8.name: Kvarner Scampi Buzara
rib-8.description: First-class scampi from the Kvarner bay cooked in white buzara sauce with olive oil and garlic.

rib-9.name: Prawn and Zucchini Risotto
rib-9.description: Krk prawn tails cooked with baby zucchini in a creamy olive oil risotto base.

rib-10.name: Monkfish in White Sauce
rib-10.description: Monkfish fillets simmered in white garlic, wine and cream sauce, served with potatoes.

pre-1.name: Krk Prosciutto and Sheep Cheese
pre-1.description: Local air-dried prosciutto, local sheep cheese from Krk farm, olives and figs.

pre-2.name: Octopus Salad
pre-2.description: Tender boiled octopus pieces tossed with potatoes, red onions, parsley and olive oil.

pre-3.name: Salted Sardines with Onion
pre-3.description: Salted sardine fillets in olive oil topped with red onions on toasted crusty bread.

pre-4.name: Krk Presnac Cake
pre-4.description: Traditional local pastry filled with young sheep cheese, eggs and lemon zest.

pre-5.name: Homemade Rožata
pre-5.description: Creamy caramel custard pudding flavored with traditional rose liqueur.

pre-6.name: Homemade Apple Strudel
pre-6.description: Warm strudel pastry filled with tart apples, cinnamon and raisins, served with vanilla sauce.

pre-7.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
pre-7.description: Warm chocolate cake with a melting hot chocolate core, served with a scoop of ice cream.

pre-8.name: Crepes with Walnuts and Honey
pre-8.description: Warm crepes stuffed with ground walnuts and drizzled with raw local Krk honey.

pre-9.name: Fritule with Cinnamon and Sugar
pre-9.description: Homemade fried local fritter balls dusted with powdered sugar and cinnamon.

pre-10.name: Figs in Prošek Wine
pre-10.description: Local Krk figs cooked in sweet prošek wine, served warm with vanilla ice cream.

footer.copyright: Bistro Top Krk. All rights reserved.

action_box.reserve_subtitle: Secure your spot in time. Enter your details below to initiate a quick table reservation via WhatsApp message.
action_box.order_subtitle: If you want to order food delivery to your home address or prefer a quick phone reservation live, contact us directly.
action_box.whatsapp_template: Hello! I would like to reserve a table at Bistro Top. Name: {name}, People: {guests}, Date: {date}, Time: {time}

hero.accent: Isola di Krk, Croazia • Pizzeria & Grill
hero.subtitle: Gusta ottime pizze, grigliate succulente e porzioni abbondanti sull'isola di Krk.
hero.desc: Ogni giorno prepariamo hamburger di prima qualità, calde pizze fatte in casa dal forno a legna e piatti dalla griglia a carbone aperta. Vieni in un'atmosfera rilassata e soddisfa la tua fame con pasti abbondanti e deliziosi.

about.tagline: Cibo di qualità e atmosfera rilassata
about.title: Benvenuti al Bistro Top
about.desc: Situato nel cuore dell'isola di Krk, il **Bistro Top** offre piatti semplici e preparati al momento. La nostra filosofia è servire porzioni abbondanti e gustose per tutta la famiglia.
about.feature1_desc: Hamburger succulenti e ćevapčići cotti su vera griglia a carbone.
about.feature2_desc: Pizze croccanti con salsa fatta in casa e tanto formaggio fuso.
about.bottom_text: Che veniate per un pranzo veloce dopo la spiaggia, una cena tra amici o una riunione di famiglia, il nostro menu offre un'ampia scelta di pizze, carne alla griglia, hamburger e insalate fresche. Qui nessuno resta affamato!

menu.tagline: Ricette fatte in casa e ingredienti freschi
menu.title: Il nostro menu
menu.subtitle: Esplora la ricca offerta di specialità dell'isola e dell'Adriatico, preparate con amore.
menu.banner_subtitle: Ambiente accogliente e cucina tradicional di Veglia
menu.allergy_note: * Si prega di informare il nostro staff di eventuali allergie prima di ordinare. Tutti i prezzi sono in euro e comprensivi di IVA.

piz-1.name: Pizza Margherita
piz-1.description: Salsa di pomodoro, mozzarella fresca, olio d'oliva e basilico fresco.

piz-2.name: Pizza Vesuvio
piz-2.description: Salsa di pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto cotto e origano.

piz-3.name: Pizza Capricciosa
piz-3.description: Salsa di pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto cotto, funghi freschi e olive.

piz-4.name: Pizza Quattro Formaggi
piz-4.description: Salsa di pomodoro, mozzarella, gorgonzola, formaggio locale di Veglia e parmigiano.

piz-5.name: Pizza Al Tonno
piz-5.description: Salsa di pomodoro, mozzarella, tonno, capperi, cipolla rossa e olio d'oliva.

piz-6.name: Pizza Picante
piz-6.description: Salsa di pomodoro, mozzarella, salame piccante, peperoncini, ajvar e cipolla rossa.

piz-7.name: Pizza di Veglia
piz-7.description: Salsa di pomodoro, formaggio pecorino locale di Veglia, prosciutto crudo, fichi selvatici e rucola.

piz-8.name: Pizza Rustica
piz-8.description: Salsa di pomodoro, mozzarella, pancetta locale, funghi, panna acida e cipolla.

piz-9.name: Pizza Vegetariana
piz-9.description: Salsa di pomodoro, mozzarella, zucchine grigliate, melanzane, peperoni, mais e pomodorini.

piz-10.name: Bistro Top Special
piz-10.description: Salsa di pomodoro, mozzarella, straccetti di filetto di manzo, crema di tartufo e rucola fresca.

ros-1.name: Ćevapčići della Casa
ros-1.description: 10 pezzi di ćevapčići di manzo al 100% cotti sulla brace, serviti in un caldo panino somun con cipolla e ajvar.

ros-2.name: Pljeskavica con Kajmak
ros-2.description: Grande polpetta di manzo servita nel panino somun con una generosa cucchiaiata di kajmak fatto in casa e cipolla rossa.

ros-3.name: Pljeskavica Ripiena
ros-3.description: Polpetta di manzo ripiena di formaggio locale e pancetta a cubetti, cotta alla griglia.

ros-4.name: Grigliata Mista 'Bistro Top'
ros-4.description: Grigliata classica: ćevapčići, spiedino di maiale, filetto di pollo marinato e salsiccia locale con patatine fritte.

ros-5.name: Spiedini di Lonza di Maiale
ros-5.description: Filetto di maiale infilzato su spiedini con cipolla e peperoni, grigliato e servito con patate al forno.

ros-6.name: Costolette di Vitello alle Erbe
ros-6.description: Spesse costolette di vitello grigliate, condite con un'emulsione di olio d'oliva, rosmarino e aglio.

ros-7.name: Costata di Manzo alla Griglia
ros-7.description: Costata di manzo frollata alla griglia, servita con patate al forno e olive.

ros-8.name: Filetto di Pollo Marinato
ros-8.description: Filetto di pollo marinato alle erbe locali e limone, grigliato e servito con zucchine.

ros-9.name: Salsicce di Veglia Fatte in Casa
ros-9.description: Salsicce di maiale tradizionali di Veglia, grigliate e servite con crauti.

ros-10.name: Filetto al Pepe Verde
ros-10.description: Filetto di manzo di prima scelta alla griglia spennellato al burro, con salsa al pepe verde e cognac.

pek-1.name: Vitello sotto la Peka
pek-1.description: Tenero vitello cotto lentamente per 3 ore sotto la campana di ferro coperta di brace, con patate novelle e cipolla.

pek-2.name: Agnello di Veglia sotto la Peka
pek-2.description: Agnello locale allevato al pascolo cotto sotto la campana con patate nostrane e salvia fresca.

pek-3.name: Polpo sotto la Peka
pek-3.description: Polpo intero dell'Adriatico cotto lentamente sotto la campana con patate, olive nere e vino bianco.

pek-4.name: Gallo Nostrano sotto la Peka
pek-4.description: Gallo ruspante cotto lentamente sotto la campana di ferro con patate, carotine e rosmarino freschi.

pek-5.name: Cinghiale sotto la Peka
pek-5.description: Carne di cinghiale marinata in vino rosso e alloro, cotta sotto la campana con prugne secche.

pek-6.name: Maialino da Latte sotto la Peka
pek-6.description: Maialino da latte cotto sotto la campana fino a doratura della cotenna croccante, servito con patate.

pek-7.name: Peka Mista di Carne
pek-7.description: Ricca combinazione di lonza di vitello e cosciotto d'agnello cotti sotto la campana con verdure di stagione.

pek-8.name: Stinco d'Agnello sotto la Peka
pek-8.description: Stinco d'agnello cotto lentamente sotto la campana con ortaggi a radice e vino dolce prošek.

pek-9.name: Anatra sotto la Peka con Mele
pek-9.description: Anatra nostrana cotta sotto la campana con mele aspre, patate e un pizzico di cannella.

pek-10.name: Verdure sotto la Peka
pek-10.description: Patate, carote, zucchine, cipolle, melanzane e peperoni cotti sotto la campana con olio d'oliva.

rib-1.name: Orata alla Griglia
rib-1.description: Orata fresca intera grigliata al rosmarino. Servita con bietola bollita e patate al prezzemolo.

rib-2.name: Spigola alla Griglia
rib-2.description: Spigola intera alla griglia condita con olio d'oliva e aglio, servita con bietole.

rib-3.name: Calamari dell'Adriatico alla Griglia
rib-3.description: Calamari interi dell'Adriatico cotti alla griglia, conditi con prezzemolo, aglio e olio di Veglia.

rib-4.name: Calamari Fritti con Patatine
rib-4.description: Anelli di calamari fritti croccanti serviti con patatine fritte, limone e salsa tartara.

rib-5.name: Risotto Nero di Seppia
rib-5.description: Cremoso risotto preparato con seppie locali, il loro nero, olio d'oliva e parmigiano.

rib-6.name: Cozze alla Buzara Rossa
rib-6.description: Cozze fresche cotte alla buzara con pomodoro, aglio, prezzemolo e vino bianco locale Žlahtina.

rib-7.name: Trancio di Tonno alla Griglia
rib-7.description: Fetta spessa di tonno fresco alla griglia spennellata d'olio, servita su letto di rucola.

rib-8.name: Scampi del Quarnaro alla Buzara
rib-8.description: Scampi di prima scelta del Quarnaro cotti in buzara in bianco con olio d'oliva e aglio.

rib-9.name: Risotto con Gamberetti e Zucchine
rib-9.description: Code di gamberetti di Veglia cotte con zucchine novelle in un cremoso risotto all'olio.

rib-10.name: Rana Pescatrice in Salsa Bianca
rib-10.description: Filetto di rana pescatrice cotto in salsa bianca all'aglio, vino e panna con patate bollite.

pre-1.name: Prosciutto di Veglia e Pecorino
pre-1.description: Prosciutto crudo locale essiccato alla bora, formaggio pecorino locale, olive e fichi.

pre-2.name: Insalata di Polpo
pre-2.description: Teneri pezzetti di polpo bollito conditi con patate, cipolla rossa, prezzemolo e olio locale.

pre-3.name: Sarde Salate con Cipolla
pre-3.description: Filetti di sarde salate in olio d'oliva conditi con cipolle rosse su pane tostato croccante.

pre-4.name: Torta Presnac di Veglia
pre-4.description: Dolce tradizionale a base di formaggio pecorino fresco, uova e scorza di limone.

pre-5.name: Rožata della Casa
pre-5.description: Cremoso budino al caramello aromatizzato con liquore tradizionale alla rosa.

pre-6.name: Strudel di Mele della Casa
pre-6.description: Strudel caldo ripieno di mele aspre, cannella e uvetta, servito con salsa alla vaniglia.

pre-7.name: Tortino al Cioccolato dal Cuore Caldo
pre-7.description: Tortino tiepido al cioccolato dal cuore liquido, servito con una pallina di gelato.

pre-8.name: Crespelle con Noci e Miele
pre-8.description: Crespelle calde ripiene di noci tritate e condite con miele grezzo locale di Veglia.

pre-9.name: Fritole con Cannella e Zucchero
pre-9.description: Fritole tradizionali calde spolverate con zucchero a velo e cannella.

pre-10.name: Fichi cotti nel Prošek
pre-10.description: Fichi locali di Veglia cotti nel vino dolce prošek, serviti caldi con gelato alla vaniglia.

footer.logo_desc: Pizzeria & Grill • Isola di Krk, Croazia
footer.copyright: Bistro Top Krk. Tutti i diritti riservati.

action_box.reserve_subtitle: Assicurati il tuo posto in tempo. Inserisci i tuoi dati qui sotto per avviare una prenotazione rapida del tavolo tramite messaggio WhatsApp.
action_box.order_subtitle: Se desideri ordinare la consegna di cibo a casa o preferisci una prenotazione telefonica rapida dal vivo, contattaci direttamente.
action_box.whatsapp_template: Ciao! Vorrei prenotare un tavolo al Bistro Top. Nome: {name}, Persone: {guests}, Data: {date}, Ora: {time}

hero.subtitle: Genießen Sie hervorragende Pizzen, saftige Grillgerichte und reichliche Portionen auf der Insel Krk.
hero.desc: Jeden Tag bereiten wir erstklassige Burger, heiße hausgemachte Pizzen aus dem Holzofen und Gerichte vom offenen Holzkohlegrill zu. Kommen Sie in eine entspannte Atmosphäre und stillen Sie Ihren Hunger mit reichlichen und leckeren Mahlzeiten.

about.title: Willkommen im Bistro Top
about.desc: Im Herzen der Insel Krk bietet das **Bistro Top** einfache, frisch zubereitete Speisen. Unsere Philosophie ist es, reichliche und leckere Portionen für die ganze Familie zu servieren.
about.feature1_desc: Saftige Burger und klassische Ćevapčići vom echten Holzkohlegrill.
about.feature2_desc: Knusprige Holzofenpizzen mit hausgemachter Tomatensauce und viel geschmolzenem Käse.
about.bottom_text: Ob Sie zu einem schnellen Mittagessen nach dem Strand, einem Abendessen mit Freunden oder einem Familientreffen kommen, unsere Speisekarte bietet eine reichhaltige Auswahl an Pizzen, Grillgerichten, Bürgern und frischen Salaten. Wir kommen auf jeden Fall wieder! Hier bleibt niemand hungrig!

menu.title: Speisekarte
menu.subtitle: Entdecken Sie die reichhaltige Auswahl an authentischen Spezialitäten der Insel und der Adria, mit Liebe zubereitet.
menu.allergy_note: * Bitte informieren Sie unser Personal vor der Bestellung über eventuelle Allergien. Alle Preise sind in Euro angegeben und enthalten die gesetzliche MwSt.

piz-1.name: Pizza Margherita
piz-1.description: Tomatensauce, frischer Mozzarella, Olivenöl und frisches Basilikum.

piz-2.name: Pizza Vesuvio
piz-2.description: Tomatensauce, Mozzarella, gekochter Schinken und Oregano.

piz-3.name: Pizza Capricciosa
piz-3.description: Tomatensauce, Mozzarella, gekochter Schinken, frische Champignons und Oliven.

piz-4.name: Pizza Quattro Formaggi
piz-4.description: Tomatensauce, Mozzarella, Gorgonzola, lokaler Krk-Käse und Parmesan.

piz-5.name: Pizza Al Tonno
piz-5.description: Tomatensauce, Mozzarella, Thunfisch, Kapern, rote Zwiebeln und Olivenöl.

piz-6.name: Pizza Picante
piz-6.description: Tomatensauce, Mozzarella, scharfe Salami, Peperoni, Ajvar und rote Zwiebeln.

piz-7.name: Pizza Krk
piz-7.description: Tomatensauce, lokaler Krk-Schafskäse, hausgemachter Prosciutto, wilde Feigen und Rucola.

piz-8.name: Pizza Rustica
piz-8.description: Tomatensauce, Mozzarella, hausgemachter Speck, Champignons, Sauerrahm und Zwiebeln.

piz-9.name: Vegetarische Pizza
piz-9.description: Tomatensauce, Mozzarella, gegrillte Zucchini, Auberginen, Paprika, Mais und Kirschtomaten.

piz-10.name: Bistro Top Spezial
piz-10.description: Tomatensauce, Mozzarella, Rinderfiletstreifen, Trüffelcreme und frischer Rucola.

ros-1.name: Hausgemachte Ćevapčići
ros-1.description: 10 Ćevapčići aus 100% Rindfleisch auf Holzkohle gegrillt, serviert in heißem Somun-Fladenbrot mit Zwiebeln und Ajvar.

ros-2.name: Pljeskavica mit Kajmak
ros-2.description: Großes Rindfleisch-Pljeskavica serviert in Somun-Fladenbrot mit einem großzügigen Stück hausgemachtem Kajmak und roten Zwiebeln.

ros-3.name: Gefüllte Pljeskavica
ros-3.description: Rinder-Pljeskavica gefüllt mit hausgemachtem Käse und Speckwürfeln, vom Grill.

ros-4.name: Grillteller 'Bistro Top'
ros-4.description: Holzkohle-Klassiker: Ćevapčići, Schweinespieß, mariniertes Hähnchenfilet und hausgemachte Wurst mit Pommes.

ros-5.name: Schweinerücken-Spieße
ros-5.description: Schweinefilet am Spieß mit Zwiebeln und Paprika, gegrillt, serviert mit Ofenkartoffeln.

ros-6.name: Kalbskoteletts mit Kräutern
ros-6.description: Dicke Kalbskoteletts vom Grill, beträufelt mit Olivenöl, Rosmarin und Knoblauch.

ros-7.name: Rumpsteak vom Rost
ros-7.description: Abgehangenes Rinderrumpsteak vom Grill mit Ofenkartoffeln und Oliven.

ros-8.name: Mariniertes Hähnchenfilet
ros-8.description: Hähnchenfilet mariniert in Kräutern und Zitrone, vom Grill, serviert mit Zucchini.

ros-9.name: Hausgemachte Krk-Würste
ros-9.description: Traditionelle Schweinswürste von der Insel Krk, vom Grill, serviert mit Sauerkraut.

ros-10.name: Pfeffersteak
ros-10.description: Premium-Rinderfilet vom Grill, mit Butter bestrichen, serviert an einer grünen Pfeffersauce mit Kognak.

pek-1.name: Kalbfleisch unter der Peka
pek-1.description: Zartes Kalbfleisch, 3 Stunden langsam unter einer mit Glut bedeckten Peka-Glocke geschmort, mit jungen Kartoffeln und Zwiebeln.

pek-2.name: Krk-Lamm unter der Peka
pek-2.description: Lammfleisch von Krk-Weiden unter der Peka gebacken mit Kartoffeln und frischem Salbei.

pek-3.name: Krake unter der Peka
pek-3.description: Ganze adriatische Krake unter der Peka geschmort mit Kartoffeln, Oliven und Weißwein.

pek-4.name: Hausgemachter Hahn unter der Peka
pek-4.description: Hausgemachter Hahn unter der Peka gebacken mit Kartoffeln, jungen Karotten und Rosmarin.

pek-5.name: Wildschwein unter der Peka
pek-5.description: Wildschweinfleisch mariniert in Wein und Lorbeerblatt, unter der Peka geschmort mit getrockneten Pflaumen.

pek-6.name: Spanferkel unter der Peka
pek-6.description: Spanferkel unter der Peka geschmort, bis die Haut goldbraun und knusprig ist, mit Kartoffeln.

pek-7.name: Gemischtes Peka-Gericht
pek-7.description: Kombination aus Kalbsrücken und Lammkeule, langsam unter der Peka gegart mit Gemüse.

pek-8.name: Lammschulter unter der Peka
pek-8.description: Lammhaxe langsam unter der Peka gegart mit Wurzelgemüse und Prošek-Süßwein.

pek-9.name: Ente unter der Peka mit Äpfeln
pek-9.description: Hausente langsam unter der Peka geschmort mit sauren Äpfeln, Kartoffeln und Zimt.

pek-10.name: Gemüse unter der Peka
pek-10.description: Kartoffeln, Karotten, Zucchini, Zwiebeln, Auberginen und Paprika unter der Peka geschmort mit Olivenöl.

rib-1.name: Goldbrasse vom Rost
rib-1.description: Frische ganze Goldbrasse vom Grill mit Rosmarin. Beilage: Mangold und Salzkartoffeln mit Knoblauch.

rib-2.name: Wolfsbarsch vom Rost
rib-2.description: Ganzes Wolfsbarsch vom Grill, mit Olivenöl und Knoblauch bestrichen, serviert mit Mangold.

rib-3.name: Gegrillter adriatischer Tintenfisch
rib-3.description: Ganze adriatische Tintenfische vom Rost, beträufelt mit Knoblauch-Petersilien-Umak und Olivenöl.

rib-4.name: Frittierter Tintenfisch mit Pommes
rib-4.description: Knusprig frittierte Tintenfischringe serviert mit Pommes frites, Zitrone und Remoulade.

rib-5.name: Schwarzes Tintenfisch-Risotto
rib-5.description: Cremiges Risotto vom Tintenfisch mit Tinte, Olivenöl und Parmesan.

rib-6.name: Miesmuscheln in Tomaten-Buzara
rib-6.description: Frische Miesmuscheln gedünstet in Sauce aus Tomaten, Knoblauch, Petersilie und Žlahtina-Weißwein.

rib-7.name: Thunfischsteak vom Grill
rib-7.description: Dicke frische Thunfischtranche vom Grill mit Olivenöl, serviert auf einem Rucolabett.

rib-8.name: Kvarner Kaisergranat auf Buzara-Art
rib-8.description: Erstklassige Kaisergranaten (Scampi) aus der Kvarner Bucht gedünstet in weißer Buzarasauce.

rib-9.name: Garnelen-Zucchini-Risotto
rib-9.description: Cremiges Risotto mit adriatischen Garnelen, jungen Zucchini und Olivenöl.

rib-10.name: Seeteufel in weißer Sauce
rib-10.description: Seeteufelfilet gedünstet in weißer Sauce aus Knoblauch, Wein und Sahne mit Salzkartoffeln.

pre-1.name: Krk-Schinken und Schafskäse
pre-1.description: Hausgemachter Schinken luftgetrocknet, Schafskäse aus lokaler Käserei, Oliven und Feigen.

pre-2.name: Kraken-Salat
pre-2.description: Zart gekochte Krakenstücke mit Kartoffeln, roten Zwiebeln, Petersilie und nativem Olivenöl.

pre-3.name: Salzige Sardinen mit Zwiebeln
pre-3.description: Gesalzene Sardinenfilets in Olivenöl mit roten Zwiebeln auf geröstetem Brot.

pre-4.name: Krčki Presnac Kuchen
pre-4.description: Traditioneller Kuchen aus jungem Schafskäse, Eiern und Zitronenschale in süßem Teig.

pre-5.name: Hausgemachte Rožata
pre-5.description: Cremiger Karamellpudding verfeinert mit traditionellem Rosenlikör.

pre-6.name: Hausgemachter Apfelstrudel
pre-6.description: Warmer Strudel mit sauren Äpfeln, Zimt und Rosinen, serviert mit Vanillesauce.

pre-7.name: Schoko-Lava-Kuchen
pre-7.description: Warmer Kuchen mit flüssigem Schokoladenkern, serviert mit einer Kugel Eiscreme.

pre-8.name: Pfannkuchen mit Walnüssen und Honig
pre-8.description: Warme Pfannkuchen gefüllt mit gemahlenen Walnüssen und beträufelt mit lokalem Krk-Honig.

pre-9.name: Krapfen mit Zimt und Zucker
pre-9.description: Hausgemachte frittierte Fritule-Bällchen, bestreut mit Puderzucker und Zimt.

pre-10.name: Feigen in Prošek-Süßwein
pre-10.description: Krk-Feigen gedünstet in süßem Prošek-Wein, warm serviert mit Vanilleeis.
